title: Fukaboshi Understands the Enemy
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is fukaboshi understands the enemy.
scene: The scene follows fukaboshi understands the enemy, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As though they could move this ship a single millimetre...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: It's thanks to idiots like you that the humans look down on our kind!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it!! The gate into the palace is wide open!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She slipped through the stretched-out connecting way and out into open water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: princess, run as far away as you can!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Out in the open water, with nothing but ocean all around you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A pathetic human, who cannot even breathe beneath the waves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you hope to become King of these waters?! Hah!!

summary: Fukaboshi Understands the Enemy. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
